name: BendSurface
summary: The BendSurface class defines a surface contour that can be used as a bend between two plates

constructors.name: BendSurface(Arc, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public BendSurface(Arc baseArc, double height, double radiusAtHeight)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BendSurface class from a base arc, a height and a radius at the top. This is the recommended constructor if no intermediate points are desired along the lateral boundaries of the bend surface.

params.name: baseArc
params.doc: Arc to form the base of the bend surface

params.name: height
params.doc: Height of the surface measured along the normal of the arc, may be positive or negative, but always nonzero

params.name: radiusAtHeight
params.doc: Radius of the arc located at the given height. Must be positive

throws.when: Thrown if the given lengths are invalid

constructors.name: BendSurface(List<Point>, List<Point>, Line, Vector)
constructors.signature: public BendSurface(List<Point> lateralBoundary1, List<Point> lateralBoundary2, Line centerLine, Vector rotationAxis)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BendSurface class from the cone lateral boundaries and the center line. This is the recommended constructor if fine grained control is desired over the lateral boundaries of the surface

params.name: centerLine
params.doc: The center line of the cone/cylinder

params.name: rotationAxis
params.doc: A vector normal to the circular cross sections of the surface. It defines the rotation axis from the start of a lateral boundary to the end of the same lateral boundary, according to the right hand rule.

constructors.name: BendSurface(Vector, Vector, List<Point>, List<Point>)
constructors.signature: public BendSurface(Vector endFaceNormal1, Vector endFaceNormal2, List<Point> lateralBoundary1, List<Point> lateralBoundary2)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BendSurface class with given parameters. The boundaries are defined by the lateral boundaries (i.e. the points on the sides of the curved part of the surface). The side boundaries are defined by the two first points and the two last points of the lateral boundaries.
constructors.remarks: This constructor may be numerically instable if the end faces are very close

throws.when: Throws an exception if one of the arguments is null.
Throws this exception if the boundaries are invalid.

constructors.name: BendSurface(Vector, Vector, LineSegment, LineSegment)
constructors.signature: public BendSurface(Vector endFaceNormal1, Vector endFaceNormal2, LineSegment sideBoundary1, LineSegment sideBoundary2)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BendSurface class with given parameters. The boundaries are defined by the side boundaries (i.e. generator lines of the surface).
constructors.remarks: This constructor may be numerically instable if the end faces are very close

throws.when: Throws exception if one of the arguments has null value.

properties.name: CenterLine
properties.summary: Gets the center line of the bend surface (i.e. the line that crosses every circular cross section of the bend at their center point)

properties.name: EndFaceNormal1
properties.summary: Gets the first end face normal.

properties.name: EndFaceNormal2
properties.summary: Gets the second end face normal.

properties.name: InwardCurved
properties.summary: Gets the direction of the curve - true if the curve is oriented towards the intersection line, false otherwise.

properties.name: LateralBoundary1
properties.summary: Gets or sets the first lateral boundary

properties.name: LateralBoundary2
properties.summary: Gets or sets the second lateral boundary

properties.name: RotationAxis
properties.summary: Gets the unit vector that defines the rotation axis (for counter clockwise rotations) of the lateral boundaries of the surface. This axis is always parallel to the direction of the center line.

properties.name: SideBoundary1
properties.summary: Gets or sets the first side boundary.

properties.name: SideBoundary2
properties.summary: Gets or sets the second side boundary.
